此.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: 止 (feet) + 人 (person) – where a person stops; here.

已.wiki_summary: Pictogram possibly depicting a snake or fetus; may have originally been the same character as 巳.

工.wiki_summary: Pictogram of a bladed tool for plowing and marking borders, or alternatively a carpenter's square.

使.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 亻 (person) + phonetic 吏.

情.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 心 (heart) + phonetic 青.

明.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: 日 (sun) + 月 (moon) – the sun just rising and the moon not yet set, i.e. dawn.

性.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 忄 (heart) + phonetic 生 – nature, personal quality.

知.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: 大 (adult) + 口 (mouth) + 子 (child) – an adult transmitting knowledge to a child; originally the same character as 智.
知.difference: Our note names the components as 口 + 矢 (mouth + arrow), but Wiktionary identifies the oracle-bone form as 大 + 口 + 子 (adult + mouth + child). The phonetic component 矢 is not mentioned by Wiktionary.

全.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: 入 + 玉 (jade) – a whole, unblemished piece of jade.
全.difference: Our note writes the second component as 王（玉）, using 王 as a graphic stand-in for 玉; Wiktionary identifies the component unambiguously as 玉 (jade).

三.wiki_summary: Ideogram (指事): three parallel strokes representing the number three; triplication of 一.
